## Martin Flodén: Teaching

### Intermediate Macroeconomics
- [EC2211 Intermediate Macroeconomics](https://www.su.se/english/education/course-catalogue/ec/ec2211)
- Undergraduate
- I teach the fall-semester version of this course
- Contents (Fall 2025):
1. Measuring the macroeconomy
2. Economic growth and the Solow model
3. Topics on growth: human capital, technological progress, finite natural resources, Malthus
4. TFP and long-term growth
5. Labor supply and unemployment
6. Consumption and investment
7. The short run: IS-MP and the Phillips curve
8. The short run: AS-AD, the Taylor rule, the time-inconsistency problem
9. Money and monetary policy
10. Government debt and fiscal policy
11. Exchange rates and international finance
12. Open economy macroeconomics and the international monetary system


### Master's course in macroeconomics
- [EC7210 Macroeconomics](https://www.su.se/english/education/course-catalogue/ec/ec7210)
- Compulsory first-semester course in the Master's program
- The listed textbook for the course is David Romer's "Advanced Macroeconomics" but it is mostly used as background reading
- I provide detailed lecture notes for all theoretical material covered
- Contents (Fall 2025):
1. Consumption theory
2. The neoclassical growth model
3. The overlapping generations model
4. The real business cycle model
5. The new keynesian business cycle model
6. Monetary policy rules and the transmission of monetary policy
7. Topics in monetary policy
8. Public debt and fiscal policy
